name: Code Testing
description: 代码测试:单元、集成、端到端与测试覆盖率

detector.inline: profile.task_kind === 'test' || profile.code_domains.includes('testing') || profile.repo_signals.some(s => /\b(jest|vitest|pytest|bun test|test (suite|case|coverage|fixture|harness|runner|file)|unit test|integration test|e2e test|write (a |the )?tests|test coverage|coverage report|fixture|flak(e|y)|mock|stub|assertion)\b|单元测试|集成测试|测试用例|测试覆盖率/i.test(s)) ? 0.88 : 0
